Home.title: Gatekeeper Console
Home.subtitle: API Gateway Management
Home.description: Manage API authentication, client credentials, route permissions, and access control from a single dashboard.
Home.feature1Description: Create and manage API clients with API key or HMAC authentication credentials. Control client lifecycle with active, suspended, and revoked states.
Home.feature2Description: Define which API endpoints require authentication and configure method-level access control with domain-based routing rules.
Home.feature3Description: Grant fine-grained permissions linking clients to specific routes and HTTP methods. Monitor usage with rate limiting and audit logs.
